form.label: RAG Analytics
form.description: Analyze RAG pipeline performance - retrieval quality, latency breakdown, and end-to-end metrics

search.query: `genai_retrieval_spans` | stats count by vector_store | sort - count
| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=CHAIN

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as avg from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=RETRIEVER GenAI_Span.vector_store=$vector_store_filter$ | eval avg = round(avg, 0)

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.documents_retrieved) as avg from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=RETRIEVER GenAI_Span.vector_store=$vector_store_filter$ | eval avg = round(avg, 1)

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.relevance_score) as avg from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=RETRIEVER GenAI_Span.vector_store=$vector_store_filter$ | eval avg = round(avg * 100, 1)
| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as avg from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=CHAIN | eval avg = round(avg, 0)

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.retrieval_latency) as "Retrieval" avg(GenAI_Span.embedding_latency) as "Embedding" avg(GenAI_Span.generation_latency) as "Generation" from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.vector_store=$vector_store_filter$ (GenAI_Span.span_type="RETRIEVER" OR GenAI_Span.span_type="LLM" OR GenAI_Span.span_type="EMBEDDING") | transpose | rename "row 1" as Value, "column" as Type

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.retrieval_latency) avg(GenAI_Span.generation_latency) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.vector_store=$vector_store_filter$ (GenAI_Span.span_type="RETRIEVER" OR GenAI_Span.span_type="LLM") by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h avg(GenAI_Span.retrieval_latency) as "Retrieval" avg(GenAI_Span.generation_latency) as "Generation"

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.relevance_score) avg(GenAI_Span.documents_retrieved) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=RETRIEVER GenAI_Span.vector_store=$vector_store_filter$ by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h avg(GenAI_Span.relevance_score) as "Relevance Score" avg(GenAI_Span.documents_retrieved) as "Docs Retrieved"

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=RETRIEVER GenAI_Span.vector_store=$vector_store_filter$ by GenAI_Span.documents_retrieved | rename GenAI_Span.documents_retrieved as documents_retrieved | sort documents_retrieved

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as queries avg(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as avg_latency perc95(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as p95_latency avg(GenAI_Span.documents_retrieved) as avg_docs avg(GenAI_Span.relevance_score) as avg_relevance sum(GenAI_Span.is_error) as errors from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=RETRIEVER GenAI_Span.vector_store=$vector_store_filter$ by GenAI_Span.vector_store GenAI_Span.embedding_model | rename GenAI_Span.* as * | eval error_rate = round((errors/queries)*100, 2) | eval avg_latency = round(avg_latency, 0) | eval p95_latency = round(p95_latency, 0) | eval avg_docs = round(avg_docs, 1) | eval avg_relevance = round(avg_relevance * 100, 1) | sort - queries | table vector_store, embedding_model, queries, avg_latency, p95_latency, avg_docs, avg_relevance, error_rate | rename vector_store as "Vector Store", embedding_model as "Embedding Model", queries as "Queries", avg_latency as "Avg Latency (ms)", p95_latency as "P95 (ms)", avg_docs as "Avg Docs", avg_relevance as "Relevance %", error_rate as "Error %"
